description: Agent roster policy defining all approved agents, their expected models, prompts, permissions, and boundaries. Used by agent-roster-guard.sh. Updated for v1.5.2 capacity-first routing with Umans primary and OpenCode Go premium reserve.

orchestrator.description: Primary owner agent for the Personal Projects workspace. v1.5.2: umans-glm-5.2 production_active_for_orchestrator_routine_medium.

explorer.description: Read-only codebase discovery and runtime-path search. v1.5.2: umans-flash production_active_for_explorer_budget.

planner.description: Plan creation, correction, and implementation-readiness checks. v1.5.2: umans-coder production_active_soak_monitoring.

implementer.description: Bounded code changes on approved touch list only. edit=allow because sub-agent context cannot obtain user approval for ask-gated edits; orchestrator touch-list approval is the gate. v1.5.2: umans-coder production_active_soak_monitoring.

reviewer.description: Risk review, regression check, and next-step recommendation. v1.5.2: umans-glm-5.1 production_active_for_reviewer_judge.

architect.description: High-ambiguity auth, schema, state-model, cross-surface design. v1.1-production: qwen3.7-plus premium reserve.

budget.description: Cheap read-only alternative for review and routing summaries. v1.5.2: umans-flash production_active_for_explorer_budget.

summary.description: Internal system agent for session summarization. NOT delegatable by orchestrator. Used by runtime for context compaction.

compaction.description: Internal system agent for context compaction. NOT delegatable by orchestrator. Used by runtime when sessions exceed token threshold.

notes: v1.5.2 capacity-first routing. Umans AI primary capacity provider, OpenCode Go premium reserve. Summary and compaction are internal system agents (mode=subagent) and are NOT in the delegatable helper roster or permission_task_allowed list. Visual-reviewer agents are part of v4.15.0 production core.
